case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. DORA MUNOZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED AUG-22-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MUNOZ, DORA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNOZ, DORA $3,791.72 PRINCIPAL, $265.93 INTEREST, $144.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,201.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-06-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE
